== Notes for [[Item:Q103933|Q103933]] ==

http://dbe.rah.es/biografias/32263/diego-de-soria

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45916

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45915

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45917

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=53813

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000077314395192

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
